name: Suspicious Proxy Binary Execution
notes: This rule triggers when a system binary is executed from a proxy.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Findstr, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Print Executable, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Atbroker Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious ZipExec Execution
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Proxy Binary Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Findstr, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Print Executable, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Atbroker Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious ZipExec Execution
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Proxy Binary Execution
Event description: Detects when a system binary is executed from a proxy.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
